1. [ AI Will Not Replace Biologists. But Biologists Who Understand AI Systems Will Replace Those Who Only Use AI Tools.](https://lilei4409.blogspot.com/2026/06/from-genomics-to-ai-biology-series-1.html) Accessed: 28 June 2026

2. [AI-Powered Coding Assistant Deletes Company Database, Says Restoring It Is Impossible](https://futurism.com/ai-vibe-code-deletes-company-database) Accessed: 28 June 2026

3. [Inventor of Vibe Coding Admits He Hand-Coded His New Project. 20 October 2025 ](https://futurism.com/artificial-intelligence/inventor-vibe-coding-doesnt-work) Accessed: 28 June 2026
